content.problemStatement: Write a program to print all prime numbers in the range [$L$, $R$].
content.inputFormat: - The first and only line of input contains two space separated integers, $L$ and $R$ - The start and end of the range.
content.outputFormat: - Print on a single line, all prime numbers between $L$ and $R$ (inclusive) in increasing order with a space between them.

sampleTestCases.explanation: The prime numbers in the range [$2$, $11$] are: $2$, $3$, $5$, $7$ and $11$
